name: kakaopay-investor-explainer
description: Skill-only Codex plugin for turning public investment text into beginner-friendly, non-advisory support explanations.

interface.shortDescription: Explain public investment text without giving advice.
interface.longDescription: Helps support, education, content, and research-support operators convert public investment, product, or research text into plain-language explanations, key terms, risk checks, uncertainty notes, and source-grounded support drafts while refusing investment recommendations.
defaultPrompt: Explain this investment text for beginners.
Draft a safe support answer from this product notice.
Extract terms, risks, and uncertainties from this research.
